"D:\Program Files\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\BakScript.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\BakScript.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\BakScript.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\BakScript.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o BakScript.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libBakScript.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\BakScript.dir\linkLibs.rsp
